quality_highlights: engine_validation.go: Every error message includes problem statement, all valid alternatives, inline YAML example, and docs URL. The validateEngineInlineDefinition function adds 'Did you mean?' via fuzzy matching.
faq.md: Comprehensive coverage across many concern areas with consistent 'See [X]' cross-references closing each answer. Tonal balance well-calibrated for enterprise audience.

single_file_improvements.issue: Line 173: 'Security Architectur' (missing e) is a broken hyperlink text in the most trust-sensitive part of the FAQ. Line 403: 'The easy way to fix this problem is...' is informal/conversational in an otherwise formal reference doc.

run-failure message uses {status} which renders raw GitHub Actions conclusion strings (timed_out, failure, cancelled) as visible prose. Results in grammatically awkward sentences like 'Approach Validator timed_out during approach validation.'
